description: HELIOS Hermes XCore agent registry consumed by tools/helios.ps1.

agents.name: branch-integrator
agents.responsibility: Fetch, list, and safely integrate HELIOS/Hermes branches with helios-control and hermes-fleet-production first.

agents.name: csharp-core-builder
agents.responsibility: Build the managed C# core and shared contract projects before downstream integration.

agents.name: security-validator
agents.responsibility: Run security validation before optimization, Azure deployment, or AIHub integration.

agents.name: azure-bootstrapper
agents.responsibility: Bootstrap and verify Azure CLI defaults, extensions, resource group, and HELIOS session variables.

agents.name: fsharp-analytics-validator
agents.responsibility: Build and test F# math, prediction, analytics, and parallel workload contracts.

agents.name: native-performance-benchmarker
agents.responsibility: Configure and build native C++ performance acceleration before runtime integration.

agents.name: frontend-observability-checker
agents.responsibility: Build the frontend shell after contracts and backend services stabilize.

agents.name: python-aihub-integrator
agents.responsibility: Run Python AIHub smoke checks after contracts, Azure, and analytics stabilize.

agents.name: final-gate-runner
agents.responsibility: Run the final HELIOS Hermes XCore integration gate before push or PR.
